CREATE TABLE test_low_cardinality (val LowCardinality(String));
INSERT INTO test_low_cardinality VALUES ('test1'), ('test2'), ('test3');
SELECT toTypeName(toLowCardinality(val)) AS source_type, toTypeName(toString(val)) AS to_type_result_type, toTypeName(CAST(val, 'String')) AS cast_result_type FROM test_low_cardinality;
CREATE TABLE test_nullable (val Nullable(String));
INSERT INTO test_nullable VALUES (NULL), ('string1'), ('string2');
SELECT toTypeName(toNullable(val)) AS source_type, toTypeName(toString(val)) AS to_type_result_type, toTypeName(CAST(val, 'String')) AS cast_result_type FROM test_nullable;
SELECT toLowCardinality(CAST(val AS String)) AS converted_val FROM test_low_cardinality WHERE toTypeName(val) = 'LowCardinality(String);
SELECT toNullable(val) AS nullable_val, toTypeName(nullable_val) AS nullable_type FROM test_nullable WHERE val IS NOT NULL;

SETTINGS cast_keep_nullable = 1; SELECT toTypeName(toNullable(val)) AS source_type, toTypeName(toString(val)) AS to_type_result_type, toTypeName(CAST(val, 'String')) AS cast_result_type FROM test_nullable;
CREATE TABLE test_mixed (int_val Int64, string_val String);
INSERT INTO test_mixed VALUES (1, '100'), (2, '200'), (3, 'three');
SELECT int_val, CAST(string_val AS Int32) AS casted_int FROM test_mixed WHERE int_val < 5;
CREATE TABLE t1 (x Int64);
SELECT CAST(x AS Int32) AS casted_x FROM t1 WHERE x > 0;
CREATE TABLE t2 (val Float64);
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES (1.5), (2.5), (NULL);
SELECT val, CAST(val AS Int8) AS casted_val FROM t2 WHERE val IS NOT NULL;

SELECT (SELECT toTypeName(toString(val)) FROM test_nullable WHERE val IS NOT NULL) AS nullable_type, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_low_cardinality WHERE toTypeName(val) = 'LowCardinality(String)') AS low_cardinality_count;
SELECT val, IF(CAST(val AS Int32) IS NULL, 'Conversion Failed', 'Conversion Successful') AS conversion_status FROM test_mixed;
